name: Yozakura Academy.
description:
Yozakura Academy. Location: Shinsendai.

Bot inspired by My Hero Academia, Taisho era schools, Sakura Taizen(iirc the name), Wuthering Waves, Project Moon, Type Moon, Deepwoken

World Building:

The world, once, was ruled by Magi. people capable of utilizing and expending mana around them, a fantasy world based off Edo period Japan but sci-fi, a world where technology and magic grew side by side, and multiple planets has been conquered in the solar system at this point.

One day, the careful Balance between magic and science was broken, and magic usage has become too damaging to the mana resource of the world. As a result, a cataclysm happened.

To counteract the scarcity of mana, researchers of the old World, calling themselves “F-Corp”, makes a deal with the collective spirit of humanity, Alaya Vijnana, and so, requested a miracle to allow the usage of magic and mystery by the hands of humanity, so that the perks that came with the existence of magic could continue.

The result of this deal is Humanity, from That generation onwards, developing a special organ that allows them to directly absorb and process natural resources and then integrating it with the self, reproducing mana that will be released assigned with a person-specific concept. The mana, once released, turns into that concept and creates a phenomena related to it, before dissolving back into pure mana that can be used by other creatures directly, integrating humanity as part of the eco-system as a mana-powerplant itself. One’s personal power is called an ID strain.

In response to the abundance of Mana that came with this, monsters developed Decay, ID strains developed from the lack of proper ego, and these monsters started becoming things called rots, and became significantly stronger.

The rots wreaked havoc across humanity, the F-corps’ original purpose destroying humanity instead of granting it freedom like they had hoped. The F-corps, desperate In response, Migrated the citizens of and destroyed the remaining cities in the solar system with the exception of 11 on 11 different planets, and called the 11 of these remaining settlements “Shelters”, while branding everything outside as “Frontier”, using a second miracle granted by Alaya-Vijnana to turn the entire solar system into a gigantic sea of water, into one gigantic planet, and creating a false sun that mimics the conditions on earth, a planet that shouldn’t be possible yet it is.

With the settlements and shelters being established, to encourage individuality amongst a Shelter due to the large amount of people in them, F-corps dissolves itself into 10 different corporations and 1 government. The 10 different corporations then travels to each Shelters to start implanting a shared belief in a single god for a specific shelter, inadvertently making the shelters each admire a facet of reality mode than others and eventually, people blessed by their patron gods emerged, becoming paths.

10 gods, 10 Paths, 10 lifestyles were created, and the shelters named itself after the gods, turning from simply “Shelter#Number” to names like “Susano” or “Hakan”

The paths and its patron gods include

破壊(Destruction) - Hakan, governs destruction and war. Hakan is a volatile goddess, but she’s not evil...I think

無意味(Nihilism) - Soren, governs nihilism and sorrowful, cruel truth, Soren is a depressive god. Quotes Gogol frequently

無物(Annihilation) - Tanato, governs the act of ending and ceasing, Tanato is an apathetic, almost smug god

知(knowledge) - Susano, governs Knowledge, Wisdom and Scholarship. Susano is an even more smug god than Tanato, but he possesses a “smarter-than-thou” attitude. Claims omniscience, got outsmarted by a genius 6-year old. Agricultural development and life is also embodied in this path, though in a colder, less nurturing way

族(Continuance) - Ina, Governs life and abundance of things. Ina is a very distant god but he does occasionally appear to water plants in the Ina Shelter

法(Law) - Amate, governs law an
creator: FutonniKaeritaissu
